summary: Docker-based reproduction confirms file download endpoint accessible without authentication
expected_security_impact: File accessible without authentication or session token
actual_observed_result: File downloaded successfully without session token (HTTP 200), content matched uploaded data
verification_method: Compare uploaded file content with downloaded content obtained without authentication headers
evidence_produced_by_run: File uploaded successfully with master key authentication
Same file downloaded without any session token or authentication headers
Downloaded content matched uploaded secret data exactly

reproduction.source_acquisition: run.sh clones the target repository on the host, checks out the pinned vulnerable commit, and mounts that checkout into the container at /target-repo.
